goal: 生成一张材料学论文 results 章节用的 1×4 横向多工况微观组织对比图，所有 panel 严格统一、白底、定性渲染，不含任何虚构尺寸数值

title_caption.caption: SEM micrographs of the Ni-based superalloy after 4 h aging at varying temperatures, showing the evolution of γ' precipitates.
title_caption.position: bottom-center, italic compact sans-serif, smaller font size

grid_layout.rule: 1 × 4 == 4; all panels identical size; consistent horizontal alignment

panels.rule: ALL panels rendered as schematic SEM-style micrographs at the same magnification

panel_style.frame: thin black border 1px around each panel, identical for all four
panel_style.label_position: (a) (b) (c) (d) at top-left of each panel, white-bordered black text on a tiny dark patch for legibility on dark micrograph background
panel_style.condition_label_position: centered above each panel, identical position across all four
panel_style.axis_labels: no axis labels; instead a shared horizontal scale bar at bottom-right of every panel, identical length and identical 'scale bar' notation, but with no numerical micron value (qualitative)
panel_style.internal_titles: no decorative per-panel titles; rely on (a)(b)(c)(d) + condition label only

shared_legend.rule: no colormap legend needed for monochromatic SEM-style micrographs

color_logic.rule: all panels rendered in a charcoal-to-light-gray monochrome palette (#1F2937 → #94A3B8 → #E5E7EB), no other hues; same value range across panels

data_authenticity.rule_when_false: render qualitative SEM-style schematics of γ' precipitates: (a) sparse small dots, (b) denser small cuboids, (c) larger cuboids with regular spacing, (d) elongated rafted plates; do NOT label any precipitate size values; do NOT include numerical scale-bar values; the impression must be of a typical SEM image, not a real dataset

must_keep: all four panels identical size, identical aspect, identical position scheme
monochrome rendering, identical value range across panels
shared scale bar style across all panels
white outer background, dark micrograph interior
(a)(b)(c)(d) labels in identical position and identical style
only sans-serif typography, identical font family
the figure should look like SEM micrographs in Acta Materialia / Materials Characterization
avoid: different magnification or different brightness per panel
different chart type per panel, mixing micrograph with chart
decorative panel titles, hero panel that visually dominates
saturated colors, neon, vivid gradients on micrographs
3D rendering, lens flare, motion blur, dramatic lighting
fabricated numerical scale-bar values, fabricated grain-size labels, fabricated EBSD overlays
marketing poster aesthetics, popular-science illustration aesthetics
